species: LSD is the prototypical psychedelic drug which profoundly alters human sensation, perception and mood.
cell_type: HEK293T cells were purchased from the American Type Culture Collection (ATCC, CRL-11268) and used for Gq and β-arrestin-1 recruitment assay in this study.
sample_source: Two eukaryotic cell lines, Spodoptera frugiperda (Sf9, Expression systems) cells and HEK293T cells (ATCC), were used in this study.
cell_line: HEK293T cells were purchased from the American Type Culture Collection (ATCC, CRL-11268) and used for Gq and β-arrestin-1 recruitment assay in this study.
